Meridian Data Migration.latest_narrative:
**Meridian Data Migration — Overall status: Red**
- Schedule (Red): Critical milestone(s) late: Environment Build, Connector Cutover Readiness Review.
- Budget (Red): Spend is 135% of planned — significantly overspending.
- Milestones (Red): 2 milestones are overdue: Environment Build, Connector Cutover Readiness Review.
- Blockers (Red): Critical blocker(s) open: Critical: vendor unable to deliver API access, now directly blocking cutover readiness.
- Sentiment (Red): Stakeholder tone is negative and worsening.
**Escalation flags:** Override: critical blocker open. Override: 2+ milestones overdue. Override: schedule, budget, milestones, blockers scored Red, compounded by negative, worsening sentiment.

**Recommended action:** Escalate the open blocker(s) to the steering committee this week; they are the primary driver of risk.

trend_notes.title: Cascade Vendor Onboarding — Stable
trend_notes.body: Trajectory: Amber → Amber → Amber → Amber. Held steady across all 4 reporting weeks at Amber.

trend_notes.title: Helix ERP Rollout — Recovering
trend_notes.body: Trajectory: Red → Amber → Amber → Green. Recovered after corrective action; now Green.

trend_notes.title: Meridian Data Migration — Declining
trend_notes.body: Trajectory: Green → Amber → Amber → Red. Critical milestone(s) late: Environment Build, Connector Cutover Readiness Review.

risks.title: Third-Party / Resourcing Dependency Risk
risks.body: 3 of 3 active projects hit a dependency-related blocker this month — vendor/third-party dependency (Cascade Vendor Onboarding, Meridian Data Migration); resourcing/ownership gap (Helix ERP Rollout). Different root causes, same pattern: this is a portfolio-level delivery risk, not a one-off, and worth a standing vendor/resourcing escalation path rather than per-project firefighting.

risks.title: Overspend Correlates With Schedule Slip
risks.body: Meridian Data Migration's budget burn reached 135% of plan in the week ending 2026-06-26, the same week its overall status was Red — spend accelerating to chase a slipping date typically front-loads cost without recovering time.

risks.title: Sentiment Is a Leading Indicator, Not a Lagging One
risks.body: On Meridian Data Migration, client sentiment turned negative in the week ending 2026-06-12, 2 week(s) before the status flipped to Red on 2026-06-26. Treating sentiment dips as an early-warning trigger — not just a symptom — would buy real lead time portfolio-wide.

deck.spotlight_bottom_line: Critical milestone(s) late: Environment Build, Connector Cutover Readiness Review. This requires executive-level attention this cycle — Escalate the open blocker(s) to the steering committee this week; they are the primary driver of risk.
